title: Icon search filter chrome — Quick / Original / Edge 2 / Download SVG
html:
Tiny screenshot of an SVG-icon search-tool filter strip (probably TheNounProject / Iconify / SVG Repo) — Details / Filters / Style: "Edge 2" / Tags: Original / Quick / Download SVG. Almost certainly companion to the food-icon spec in the same evening's roadmap — Yahir hunting Brotein icons.
